message:
feat(fp-columnar): add isnull/notnull/var/std/sem/skew/kurt/ptp parity (frankenpandas-dzxr)

Seven Column helpers that round out the descriptive-stats surface:

- isnull / notnull — per-row Bool columns flagging missing and
  non-missing positions. Matches pd.Series.isna/notna.
- var(ddof) / std(ddof) / sem(ddof) — ddof-parameterized moment
  wrappers over fp-types::nanvar/nanstd/nansem. Defaults to ddof=1
  by caller convention; pandas default matches.
- skew() — bias-corrected sample skewness (requires n >= 3);
  constant input returns 0.0 to avoid divide-by-zero (pandas).
- kurt() — excess sample kurtosis (Fisher, bias-corrected; n >= 4).
  Both delegate to fp-types nanskew / nankurt.
- ptp() — peak-to-peak range (max − min) via fp-types::nanptp;
  empty / all-missing columns return Null(NaN).

Co-lands frankenpandas-iwrh (kurt/skew), rvt6 (sem/var/std),
j4ds (ptp).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
